scripts.build: pnpm -C dashboard-web build && pnpm -C dashboard-api build && pnpm -C berta-agent build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm -C dashboard-web typecheck && pnpm -C dashboard-api typecheck && pnpm -C berta-agent typecheck
scripts.lint: pnpm -C dashboard-web lint && pnpm -C dashboard-api lint
scripts.format: pnpm -C dashboard-web format && pnpm -C dashboard-api format
